scripts.migration:create: npm run build && npx typeorm migration:create src/database/migrations/$npm_config_name
scripts.migration:generate: npm run build && npx typeorm migration:generate src/database/migrations/$npm_config_name -d dist/database/data-source.js
scripts.migration:run: npm run build && npx typeorm migration:run -d dist/database/data-source.js
scripts.migration:revert: npm run build && npx typeorm migration:revert -d dist/database/data-source.js
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec "npm run start:compiled"
